extDescription.message: Pick a video on the page and capture it as MP4.

activeTabUnavailable.message: Could not access the active tab.

pageUnavailable.message: The extension cannot run on this page, or no video has been detected yet.

popupDescription.message: Select a video on the page and capture it as MP4.

selectVideoOnPage.message: Select a video to record on this page

noVideosDetected.message: No videos detected. Play a video, then refresh.

captureStreamHasNoTracks.message: No video or audio is available to record. Play the video and try again.

streamingSaveUnsupported.message: This browser does not support streaming file saves.

mp4AtSelectedDestination.message: The MP4 is in the destination selected when recording started.

recordingAndSavingDescription.message: Recording data is being written to the destination selected at the start.

saveFailedDescription.message: A problem occurred while writing the file.

saveStatusUnknownTitle.message: Could not confirm the save status

saveStatusUnknownDescription.message: The connection to the recording source ended before the MP4 save could be confirmed. Check the selected destination.

partiallySavedTitle.message: Saved content up to the stop point

partiallySavedDescription.message: $REASON$. Content up to the stop point has been saved to the destination selected when recording started.

savedAfterVideoEnded.message: Recording stopped when the video ended, and the MP4 was saved.

savedDescription.message: The MP4 was saved to the destination selected when recording started.

stopReasonResolutionChanged.message: Stopped automatically because the video resolution changed

stopReasonSourceClosed.message: The source page or stream was closed

stopReasonVideoRemoved.message: Stopped automatically because the selected video was removed from the page

stopReasonUnsupported.message: The browser does not support this recording method

stopReasonWriteFailed.message: Could not write to the file
